version: AMOS Gann Live Ticker Registry v0.2
purpose: Central registry for tickers with independent Gann engines. v0.2 adds LITE as Gann Live.

live_tickers.engine_version: AMOS Unified Gann Resonance Engine v0.4
next_required: Verify anchors from real chart data
Connect live price / AVWAP / RSI / options data
Keep Gann as confirmation, not standalone trigger
Verify anchors from real chart data
Connect live price / AVWAP / RSI / options data
Keep Gann as confirmation, not standalone trigger
Verify anchors from real chart data
Connect live price / AVWAP / RSI / options data

lookup_rule: For each ticker, look for a registry live_tickers entry; if present, insert Gann Research Zone; otherwise show Gann Pending.
guardrails: Do not treat sample/manual-ready Gann data as live market data.
Do not allow Gann alone to trigger buy/sell.
If hard_missing_data is non-empty, cap action to Watch / Research Only unless other modules confirm.
Verified anchors must replace sample anchors before real trading use.
delta_from_v0_1: LITE moved from Gann Pending to Gann Live
Pending list reduced to IREN and HOOD
next: Regenerate generic stock pages with CRDO/NVDA/LITE Gann Live
